<!-- # Complete Portfolio -->

::: {.column-screen}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

function buildPortfolioMetrics() {
  if (!portfolioData || portfolioData.length === 0)
    return { error: html`<div class="alert alert-warning">No portfolio data available</div>` };

  const tickerPrices = processedQuotesData ?? portfolioData.tickerFirstLastPrices;
  if (!tickerPrices || Object.keys(tickerPrices).length === 0)
    return { error: html`<div class="alert alert-warning">Incomplete portfolio data – missing price information</div>` };

  const { startDate = new Date(), endDate = new Date() } = portfolioData.datasetDateRange ?? {};
  const yearsDiff = (endDate - startDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 365);

  /* asset‑class totals & per‑ticker weights */
  const classTotals = calculateAssetClassWeights(tickerPrices);
  const tickerData  = {};
  let validCount = 0;

  for (const [ticker, price] of Object.entries(tickerPrices)) {
    if (!price.firstPrice || !price.lastPrice || price.firstPrice <= 0 || price.lastPrice <= 0) continue;

    const info = Array.isArray(equity_tickers) ? equity_tickers.find(t => t.Ticker === ticker) : {};
    const type = info?.Type ?? price.type ?? "Equity";
    validCount++;

    const w = calculateTickerWeights(ticker, type, price,
                                     classTotals, equity_weight, bond_weight,
                                     fixed_optimal_weight);

    const initial = investment_amount * w.completeWeight;
    const shares  = initial / price.firstPrice;
    const current = shares * price.lastPrice;
    const totRet  = initial ? current / initial - 1 : 0;

    let annRet = 0;
    if (yearsDiff > 0 && totRet >= -1 && isFinite(totRet)) {
      annRet = Math.pow(1 + totRet, 1 / yearsDiff) - 1;
      if (!isFinite(annRet)) annRet = 0;
    }

    tickerData[ticker] = {
      type,
      name:   info?.Name ?? ticker,
      sector: info?.Sector ?? "N/A",
      assetClassWeight: w.assetClassWeight,
      riskyPfWeight:    w.riskyPfWeight,
      completeWeight:   w.completeWeight,
      initialValue:     initial,
      currentValue:     current,
      totalReturn:      totRet,
      annualizedReturn: annRet
    };
  }

  if (validCount === 0)
    return { error: html`<div class="alert alert-danger">No valid ticker data available for portfolio calculations</div>` };

  /* portfolio totals */
  const totals = Object.values(tickerData).reduce((a, d) => ({
    initial: a.initial + d.initialValue,
    current: a.current + d.currentValue
  }), { initial: 0, current: 0 });

  const totalRet = totals.initial ? totals.current / totals.initial - 1 : 0;
  let   irr      = 0;
  if (yearsDiff > 0 && totalRet >= -1 && isFinite(totalRet)) {
    irr = Math.pow(1 + totalRet, 1 / yearsDiff) - 1;
    if (!isFinite(irr)) irr = 0;
  }

  return {
    startDate, endDate, yearsDiff,
    totals, totalRet, irr,
    tickerData
  };
}
```

<!-- 
## Inputs

::: {.toolbar .collapsible-toolbar style="width: 100%;"}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

toolbarToggle = {
  // Wait for the document to fully load
  const toolbar = document.querySelector(".toolbar");
  if (!toolbar) return null;
  
  // Add the necessary class that Quarto strips away
  toolbar.classList.add("collapsible-toolbar");
  
  // Create and add the toggle button
  const toggleBtn = document.createElement("div");
  toggleBtn.className = "toolbar-toggle";
  toggleBtn.title = "Toggle toolbar";
  toolbar.prepend(toggleBtn);
  
  // Toggle function
  function toggleToolbar() {
    toolbar.classList.toggle("collapsed");
    try {
      localStorage.setItem("portfolio-toolbar-collapsed", 
                           toolbar.classList.contains("collapsed"));
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn("Could not save toolbar state");
    }
  }
  
  // Add click event
  toggleBtn.addEventListener("click", toggleToolbar);
  
  // Apply saved state
  try {
    const savedState = localStorage.getItem("portfolio-toolbar-collapsed");
    if (savedState === "true") {
      toolbar.classList.add("collapsed");
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.warn("Could not load saved toolbar state");
  }
  
  return { toggle: toggleToolbar };
}
```

```{ojs}

// Create Investment Amount with currency formatting
viewof investment_amount = createCurrencyInput({
  min: 10000,
  max: 1000000,
  value: 100000,
  step: 5000,
  label: "Investment Amount:",
  decimals: 0
})
```

```{ojs}
// Create Investment Time Horizon
viewof time_horizon = createNumericInput({
  min: 1,
  max: 50,
  value: 5,
  step: 1,
  label: "Time Horizon (Years):",
  format: "integer",
  decimals: 0
})
```

:::
 -->

::: {.panel-tabset style="height: 100%; margin-bottom: 2px;"}

### Holdings

:::: {.columns style="height: 600px; width: 100%;"}

#### Porfolio Value {width=70%}

```{ojs}
html`
  <div class="card">
    <div class="card-body">
      <table class="table table-sm mb-0">
        <tbody>
          <tr><th scope="row" style="width: 40%;">Initial Investment:</th><td>${formatCurrency(investment_amount)}</td></tr>
          <tr><th scope="row" style="width: 40%;">Time Horizon:</th><td>${time_horizon.toFixed(1)} yrs</td></tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
      
      <div class="mt-3">
        <h5 class="table-title" style="margin-bottom: 0;">Key Portfolios</h5>
        <div class="table-responsive">
          ${assetClassAllocationTable(3)}
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;
```

#### Asset Class Allocation Chart {width=30%}

```{ojs}
viewof assetClassBarChart = {
  const data = dynamicAllocations;

  // Bar‑chart data
  const barData = [
    { asset: "Risk‑Free", weight: (1 - fixed_optimal_weight) * 100 },
    { asset: "Bond",      weight:  fixed_optimal_weight * bond_weight   * 100 },
    { asset: "Equity",    weight:  fixed_optimal_weight * equity_weight * 100 },
  ];

  /* NEW: sort a fresh copy in descending order of weight */
  const barDataSorted = [...barData].sort((a, b) => b.weight - a.weight);

  const chart = Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 70,
    marginRight: 40,
    marginTop: 0, 
    marginBottom: 20, 
    y: {
      label: "",
      domain: barDataSorted.map(d => d.asset),  
      padding: 0.15,
      tickFormat: d => d,
    },
    x: {
      label: "",
      domain: [0, d3.max(barDataSorted, d => d.weight) * 1.1],
      grid: false,
      axis: false,         // Hide the axis line completely
      tickFormat: () => "" // Return empty strings as tick labels
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(barDataSorted, {
        y: "asset",
        x: "weight",
        fill: "asset",
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.asset}: ${d.weight.toFixed(1)}%`
      }),
      Plot.text(barDataSorted, {
        y: "asset",
        x: "weight",
        text: d => `${d.weight.toFixed(1)}%`,
        dx: 10,
        textAnchor: "start",
        fontWeight: "bold",
        fontSize: 16
      })
    ]
  });
  
  // Create container with heading
  const container = html`
  <div>
    <h5 class="table-title" style="margin: 0; padding: 0;">Asset Class Allocation</h5>
    ${chart}
  </div>`;
  
  return container;
}
```

:::

:::: {.columns style="width: 100%;"}

#### Security Allocation {width=70%}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

securityAllocationTable()
```

#### Bar Chart {width=30%}

```{ojs}
viewof securityBarChart = {
  // Get portfolio data with security information
  const metrics = buildPortfolioMetrics();
  if (metrics.error) return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">No security data available</div>`;
  
  // Create bar chart data from ticker information
  const barData = Object.entries(metrics.tickerData).map(([ticker, data]) => ({
    ticker: ticker,
    name: data.name,
    type: data.type,
    weight: data.completeWeight * 100 // Convert to percentage
  }));
  
  // Sort by weight in descending order
  const barDataSorted = [...barData].sort((a, b) => b.weight - a.weight);
  
  // Limit to top 10 securities if there are too many
  const displayData = barDataSorted.slice(0, 10);
  
  const chart = Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 70,
    marginRight: 40,
    marginTop: 0, 
    marginBottom: 20, 
    y: {
      label: "",
      domain: displayData.map(d => d.ticker), // Use ticker for y-axis
      padding: 0.15,
      tickFormat: d => d,
      fontWeight: "bold"
    },
    x: {
      label: "",
      domain: [0, d3.max(displayData, d => d.weight) * 1.1],
      grid: false,
      axis: false,
      tickFormat: () => ""
    },
    color: {
      domain: ["Equity", "Bond", "Risk-Free"],
      range: ["#f28e2c", "#4e79a7", "#e15759"]
    },
    marks: [
      Plot.barX(displayData, {
        y: "ticker",
        x: "weight",
        fill: "type", // Color by asset type
        tip: true,
        title: d => `${d.ticker}: ${d.name}\n${d.weight.toFixed(1)}%`
      }),
      Plot.text(displayData, {
        y: "ticker",
        x: "weight",
        text: d => `${d.weight.toFixed(1)}%`,
        dx: 10,
        textAnchor: "start",
        fontWeight: "bold",
        fontSize: 16
      })
    ]
  });
  
  // Create container with heading
  const container = html`
  <div>
    <h5 class="table-title" style="margin: 0; padding: 0;">Security Allocation</h5>
    ${chart}
  </div>`;
  
  return container;
}
```

:::

### Historical Performance 

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

// Use the imported processQuotesData function
processedQuotesData = processQuotesData(daily_quotes, equity_tickers);
```

:::: {.columns style="height: calc(100vh - 650px); width: 100%;"}

#### Performance Summary Card {width=35%}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

function portfolioPerformanceCard() {
  const m = buildPortfolioMetrics();
  if (m.error) return m.error;

  return html`
    <div>
        <h5>Portfolio Historical Performance (5Y)</h5>
        <table class="table table-sm mb-0">
          <tbody>
            <tr><th>Initial Investment:</th><td>${formatCurrency(m.totals.initial)}</td></tr>
            <tr><th>Current Value:</th>     <td>${formatCurrency(m.totals.current)}</td></tr>
            <tr><th>Holding Period Return:</th><td>${formatPercent(m.totalRet)}</td></tr>
            <tr><th>IRR (Annualized):</th>  <td>${formatPercent(m.irr)}</td></tr>
            <tr><th>Time Period:</th>
                <td>${d3.timeFormat("%b %d %Y")(m.startDate)} – ${d3.timeFormat("%b %d %Y")(m.endDate)}
                    (${m.yearsDiff.toFixed(1)} yrs)</td></tr>
          </tbody>
        </table>
    </div>`;
};
```

```{ojs}
portfolioPerformanceCard()
```

#### Historical Performance Line Chart {width=65%}

```{ojs}
//| echo: false

viewof portfolioValueChart = {
  /* ─── Guard clauses ─────────────────────────────────── */
  if (!daily_quotes?.Ticker || !daily_quotes?.Date || !daily_quotes?.Close)
    return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">No price time‑series data available for charting</div>`;

  const tickerPrices = processedQuotesData ?? {};
  if (Object.keys(tickerPrices).length === 0)
    return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">No ticker price information available</div>`;

  /* ─── Asset weights & shares ────────────────────────── */
  const assetClassTotals = calculateAssetClassWeights(tickerPrices);
  const tickerWeights = {};

  for (const [ticker, priceData] of Object.entries(tickerPrices)) {
    // skip invalid price rows
    if (!priceData.firstPrice || !priceData.lastPrice || priceData.firstPrice <= 0 || priceData.lastPrice <= 0) continue;

    const info = Array.isArray(equity_tickers) ? equity_tickers.find(t => t.Ticker === ticker) : {};
    const type = info?.Type ?? priceData.type ?? "Equity";

    tickerWeights[ticker] = {
      weight: calculateTickerWeights(ticker, type, priceData,
                                     assetClassTotals, equity_weight,
                                     bond_weight, fixed_optimal_weight).completeWeight,
      type
    };
  }

  /* ─── Daily close matrix date → {ticker:price} ─────── */
  const dateTickerPrices = {};
  for (let i = 0; i < daily_quotes.Date.length; i++) {
    const date   = new Date(daily_quotes.Date[i]).toISOString().split("T")[0];
    const ticker = daily_quotes.Ticker[i];
    const close  = daily_quotes.Close[i];
    if (!dateTickerPrices[date]) dateTickerPrices[date] = {};
    dateTickerPrices[date][ticker] = close;
  }
  const sortedDates = Object.keys(dateTickerPrices).sort();

  /* ─── Earliest date with full data set ─────────────── */
  const earliest = sortedDates.find(date =>
    Object.keys(tickerWeights).every(t => Number.isFinite(dateTickerPrices[date]?.[t]))
  );
  if (!earliest)
    return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">Cannot find a date where all tickers have valid price data</div>`;

  /* ─── Shares per ticker based on initial weights ───── */
  const tickerShares = Object.fromEntries(
    Object.keys(tickerWeights).map(t => {
      const initPx = dateTickerPrices[earliest][t];
      const initInv = investment_amount * tickerWeights[t].weight;
      return [t, initInv / initPx];
    })
  );

  /* ─── Portfolio value time‑series ───────────────────── */
  const portfolioTS = sortedDates.flatMap(date => {
    const prices = dateTickerPrices[date];
    const valid  = Object.keys(tickerWeights).every(t => Number.isFinite(prices?.[t]));
    if (!valid) return [];
    const pv = Object.keys(tickerWeights)
      .reduce((sum, t) => sum + prices[t] * tickerShares[t], 0);
    return [{ Date: new Date(date), Close: pv }];
  });

  if (portfolioTS.length === 0)
    return html`<div class="alert alert-warning">Not enough data points to generate chart</div>`;

  /* ─── Performance summary numbers ───────────────────── */
  const initVal   = portfolioTS[0].Close;
  const currVal   = portfolioTS.at(-1).Close;
  const totalRet  = initVal ? currVal / initVal - 1 : 0;
  const startDate = portfolioTS[0].Date;
  const endDate   = portfolioTS.at(-1).Date;
  const yearsDiff = (endDate - startDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 365);
  const perfColor = totalRet >= 0 ? "#28a745" : "#dc3545";

  /* ─── Chart ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
  return Plot.plot({
    marginLeft: 80,
    marginRight: 20,
    style: { fontSize: "14px", background: "transparent", overflow: "visible" },
    x: {
      type: "time",
      label: "Date",
      domain: [startDate, endDate],
      tickFormat: d => {
        const m = d.getMonth(), y = d.getFullYear().toString().slice(-2);
        return `Q${Math.floor(m / 3) + 1}'${y}`;
      }
    },
    y: {
      grid: true,
      label: "Portfolio Value ($)",
      labelOffset: 45,
      domain: [0, Math.max(d3.max(portfolioTS, d => d.Close) * 1.05, initVal * 1.05)],
      tickFormat: d => `$${d3.format(",")(d.toFixed(0))}`
    },
    marks: [
      // Initial investment line & label
      Plot.ruleY([initVal], {       
        stroke: "#0b3040",
        strokeWidth: 2.5,
        strokeDasharray: "4 4" }),
      Plot.text([{ x: startDate, y: initVal }], {
        text: `Initial Investment: ${formatCurrency(initVal)}`,
        dy: -8, fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "bold", textAnchor: "start"
      }),

      // Filled area + portfolio line
      Plot.areaY(portfolioTS, { x: "Date", y: "Close", fill: perfColor, fillOpacity: 0.1, curve: "natural" }),
      Plot.lineY(portfolioTS, {
        x: "Date", y: "Close", stroke: perfColor, strokeWidth: 3, curve: "natural",
        tip: { format: { y: v => formatCurrency(v) } }
      }),

      // Endpoint dot and labels
      Plot.dot([portfolioTS.at(-1)], { x: "Date", y: "Close", r: 6, stroke: "white", fill: perfColor }),
      Plot.text([portfolioTS.at(-1)], {
        x: "Date", y: "Close",
        text: `Current Value: ${formatCurrency(currVal)}`,
        dx: 5, dy: -15, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "bold"
      }),
      Plot.text([portfolioTS.at(-1)], {
        x: "Date", y: "Close",
        text: `${totalRet >= 0 ? "+" : ""}${(totalRet * 100).toFixed(2)}%`,
        dx: 5, dy: 15, fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "bold", fill: perfColor
      })
    ]
  });
}
```

:::

#### Performance Summary Table

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| output: false

function securityPerformanceTable() {
  const m = buildPortfolioMetrics();
  if (m.error) return m.error;

  return html`
    <div class="table-responsive">
      <h5 class="table-title">Individual Assets Performance</h5>
      <table class="table table-sm table-hover">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Asset&nbsp;Class</th><th>Ticker</th><th>Name</th><th>Sector</th>
            <th>Asset&nbsp;Class&nbsp;Wgt</th><th>Risky&nbsp;Pf&nbsp;Wgt</th><th>Complete&nbsp;Pf&nbsp;Wgt</th>
            <th>Initial&nbsp;Value</th><th>Current&nbsp;Value</th>
            <th>HPR</th><th>IRR</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${Object.entries(m.tickerData)
            .sort(([_t1, d1], [_t2, d2]) => d2.completeWeight - d1.completeWeight)
            .map(([t, d]) => html`
              <tr>
                <td>${d.type}</td>
                <td><strong>${t}</strong></td>
                <td>${d.name}</td>
                <td>${d.sector}</td>
                <td>${formatPercent(d.assetClassWeight)}</td>
                <td>${formatPercent(d.riskyPfWeight)}</td>
                <td>${formatPercent(d.completeWeight)}</td>
                <td>${formatCurrency(d.initialValue)}</td>
                <td>${formatCurrency(d.currentValue)}</td>
                <td>${formatPercent(d.totalReturn)}</td>
                <td>${formatPercent(d.annualizedReturn)}</td>
              </tr>
            `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>`;
}
```

```{ojs}
securityPerformanceTable()
```

### Projections and Fee Structure

#### Forecast

```{ojs}
html`
  <div class="card" style="height: 700px;">
    <div class="card-body d-flex flex-column" style="padding: 0.75rem; height: 100%;">
      <h5 class="card-title" style="margin-bottom: 0.5rem;">Expected Return</h5>
      <div style="flex: 1; position: relative; min-height: 0;">
        <iframe 
          style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 700px;"
          id="capitalAlocation-embed" 
          title="capitalAlocation Embed"
          src="https://raw.githack.com/renan-peres/mfin-portfolio-management/refs/heads/main/dashboard/anychart_js.html"
          frameborder="0" allow="clipboard-write" allowfullscreen>
        </iframe>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
`;
```

#### Fee Structure

### Benchmark Comparison

```{ojs}
html`
  <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; height: 100%;">
    <div style="position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 97%;">
      <iframe 
        width="100%" 
        height="100%" 
        src="https://raw.githack.com/renan-peres/mfin-portfolio-management/refs/heads/main/reports/portfolio_vs_benchmark-2025-04-26.html"
        frameborder="0"
        allowfullscreen
      ></iframe>
    </div>
  </div>
`;
```

:::
